name: Understand-Anything
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Lum1104 /

      Understand-Anything  

    
      Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.
summary: 该项目能将任意代码转化为可交互、可搜索的知识图谱，并支持向图谱提问，因其与主流AI编程工具（如Claude Code、Cursor等）深度集成，值得关注。

name: codegraph
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        colbymchenry /

      codegraph  

    
      Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local
summary: CodeGraph 是一个为 Claude Code、Codex 等 AI 编程工具预建索引的本地代码知识图谱，能大幅减少 Token 消耗和工具调用次数，值得关注因为它显著提升 AI 编码效率且完全本地运行。

name: rohitg00
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        rohitg00 /

      ai-engineering-from-scratch  

    
      Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
summary: 该项目是一个从零开始学习并构建AI工程的Python教程仓库，强调动手实践并交付可用成果，适合想系统掌握AI工程全流程的开发者。

name: mukul975
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        mukul975 /

      Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills  

    
      754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 5 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND & NIST AI RMF · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 26 security domains · Apache 2.0
summary: 该项目提供了754个结构化的网络安全技能，并映射到MITRE ATT&CK等五大框架，支持Claude Code、GitHub Copilot等20多个AI平台，值得关注因为它为AI代理标准化了网络安全能力，便于集成与扩展。

name: presenton
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        presenton /

      presenton  

    
      Open-Source AI Presentation Generator and API (Gamma, Beautiful AI, Decktopus Alternative)
summary: Presenton 是一个开源的 AI 演示文稿生成器及 API，可作为 Gamma、Beautiful AI 等工具的替代品，因其开源、可自托管且功能强大而值得关注。

name: LongLive
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        NVlabs /

      LongLive  

    
      LongLive 2.0: Infra - Long Video Gen
summary: LongLive 2.0 是一个用于生成长视频的推理基础设施项目，值得关注因为它能高效支持超长视频生成，解决了现有模型在时长和计算资源上的瓶颈。

name: the-book-of-secret-knowledge
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        trimstray /

      the-book-of-secret-knowledge  

    
      A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.
summary: 该项目是一个汇集了各类技术手册、速查表、黑客技巧、命令行工具等资源的精选清单，因其内容全面且持续更新，被誉为技术人员的“秘密知识宝典”。

name: multica
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        multica-ai /

      multica  

    
      The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.
summary: multica 是一个开源的管理型 AI 智能体平台，能将编码代理转化为真正的团队成员，支持分配任务、跟踪进度和技能积累。它值得关注是因为它让多个 AI 代理像人类团队一样协作，显著提升复杂开发任务的自动化与效率。
